Faction.name: {=kotk_eahiraclan}Banu Eahira
Faction.text: {=kotk_eahiraclan_desc}House Banu Eihara of the Aserai faction is a noble family that strikes fear into the hearts of their enemies. Led by the fierce and uncompromising Mia Kalifa, the family is known for their relentless pursuit of victory and their complete lack of mercy on the battlefield. The Banu Eihara clan is primarily composed of female warriors, trained from birth to fight with deadly efficiency. They are known for their expertise in horseback riding, archery, and close combat, and are feared by all who face them in battle. The family's ruthless tactics have earned them a reputation for their brutality and cunning. They are not above using ambushes, decoys, and other underhanded tactics to gain an advantage over their foes. Once the Banu Eihara have their enemy in their sights, they show no mercy, cutting down their opponents without hesitation. Sultan Unqid has come to rely on the Banu Eihara for their ferocity and strategic thinking in times of war. He recognizes their value as his most effective tool in crushing his enemies and maintaining his rule over the Aserai people. To their enemies, the Banu Eihara are a terrifying force of nature - a family of ruthless warriors who will stop at nothing to achieve victory. They are a testament to the unyielding strength and resilience of the Aserai people, and a reminder to all that they should fear the wrath of House Banu Eihara. Also... They put the Ass in Asserai.

Faction.name: {=kotk_wameclan}fen Wame
Faction.text: {=kotk_wameclan_desc}House Fen Wame is a noble house from the Battania, hailing from the rugged highlands. Led by the fearsome warrior lady, Skyler McKay, they are known for their fierce loyalty to their people and their king, High King Caladog. What sets House Fen Wame apart from other noble houses in Battania is the fact that they are predominantly led by women. Their female warriors are some of the most skilled in the land, and they are feared by their enemies for their deadly accuracy with a bow and their fearless charges on horseback. Despite their reputation as fierce warriors, House Fen Wame is also known for their deep love of music and poetry. They are often sought after by bards and musicians from all over Calradia, and their performances are said to be some of the most moving and hauntingly beautiful in the land. High King Caladog recognizes the importance of House Fen Wame in the defense of Battania, and he has made them his personal favorites. He knows that with Skyler McKay and her warriors by his side, he can face any challenge that comes his way. High King Caladog also enjoys clapping them cheeks.

Faction.name: {=kotk_girlempire_s1_clan}Chestricaros
Faction.text: {=kotk_girlempire_s1_clan_desc}House Chestricaros is a noble family of the Southern Empire, known for their unwavering loyalty to Empress Rhagaea in the civil war. They have a long and proud history of service to the empire, with many of their members having fought in the legions for generations. Their lands lie on the border with Aserai and Khuzait, making them frequent targets of raiders from those lands. Despite the constant threat of attack, the Chestricaros remain fiercely independent and have built a formidable military force. They are known for their skilled cavalry, who charge into battle with a fierce determination and unbreakable resolve. Their warriors are also highly trained in archery and swordsmanship, making them a formidable force on the battlefield. Though they often clash with their neighboring nations, the Chestricaros always fight with honor and valor, earning them the respect of their allies and the fear of their enemies.

Faction.name: {=kotk_girlempire_w1_clan}Dongeros
Faction.text: {=kotk_girlempire_w1_clan_desc}House Dongeros is a distinguished and powerful family within the Western Empire, known for their unwavering loyalty to Emperor Garios. Led by the cunning and astute matriarch, Lady Sasha Grey, they have played a crucial role in the ongoing civil war, providing soldiers, resources, and political support to the embattled emperor. Despite being surrounded by hostile forces, House Dongeros has managed to maintain its position of influence and prestige, thanks to Lady Grey's shrewd leadership and strategic acumen. Her family's troops are renowned for their discipline and proficiency in combat, often emerging victorious even in the face of overwhelming odds. As the conflict between the warring factions rages on, House Dongeros remains steadfast in its allegiance to the embattled emperor, ready to defend the Western Empire against all comers and uphold their family's honor and legacy.

Faction.name: {=kotk_girlempire_n1_clan}Holentor
Faction.text: {=kotk_girlempire_n1_clan_desc}House Holentor of the Northern Empire is one of the oldest and most prestigious noble families in Calradia. They are known for their military prowess, diplomatic skill, and unwavering loyalty to Emperor Lucon. Holentor's ancestral castle is located in the heart of the empire, overlooking the bustling city of Omor. Led by the wise and shrewd Julia Alexandratou, the house has become a key player in the ongoing civil war, fiercely supporting the emperor's claim to the throne. With a well-trained army and a network of loyal vassals, House Holentor has been able to hold its ground against the numerous enemies that seek to challenge the empire's authority. Despite their military might, House Holentor is also respected for their cultural contributions to the empire. They are known for their patronage of the arts and their support for education and scholarship. In fact, the current Lady Holentor is a renowned historian and philosopher, often consulted by the emperor himself on matters of state.

Faction.name: {=kotk_hora_clan}Horaoving
Faction.text: {=kotk_hora_clan_desc}House Horaoving is a renowned noble family in Sturgia, known for their fierce loyalty to the Grand Prince. Led by the formidable Puma Swede, they have become an essential part of the Sturgian military and are respected by all who serve with them. The Horaoving family has a long and proud history, dating back to the founding of the Sturgian state. They are known for their unwavering bravery on the battlefield and their ability to inspire their soldiers to fight to the last man. The Horaoving warriors are especially skilled in close-quarters combat, and their use of axes and shields is legendary. As staunch supporters of the Grand Prince, the Horaoving family has been involved in many of the major conflicts that have shaped Sturgia's history. They have been at the forefront of battles against the Khuzaits and Vlandians and have played a pivotal role in securing Sturgia's borders. Their fierce loyalty to their leader and their people has earned them the respect of all who know them, and they are considered by many to be the very embodiment of Sturgian pride, honor and thiccc asses.

Faction.name: {=kotk_putain_clan}dey Putain
Faction.text: {=kotk_putain_clan_desc}House Dey Putain of Vlandia is a noble house known for their fierce loyalty to King Derthert. They have a long and storied history of serving the Vlandian crown, with many of their ancestors having fought in the kingdom's wars against foreign powers. Led by the formidable Nikita Bellucci, the house is renowned for their skilled heavy cavalry, which has helped turn the tide of many battles in the king's favor. Despite their reputation as staunch royalists, the house has not been without its internal struggles. Lady Bellucci has had to contend with dissenting voices within her own family, with some members questioning the wisdom of aligning themselves so closely with King Derthert. However, the lady has always been quick to quash any rebellion and maintain the unity of her house.
